title: PRIMARY CARE - 211info
text: SUNRISE FAMILY CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services include general medical exams and acute and chronic care. 320 SE Baker Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Tuesday 8am-7pm. Wednesday 9am-7pm, Thursday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 474-3600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 474-3600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, and most private insurance AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: General Medical Care General Medical Care * People with Chronic Illnesses General Physical Examinations Medication Information/Management If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
